narrative:
DOMINANT DRIVERS

1. USD strength accelerating because H4 CSM USD rising from 0 to 40 while Fed hike expectations and yield climbing align with DXY upside
2. CHF dominance fading on H4 because D1 CSM of 100 diverges sharply from H4 CSM of 68, signaling momentum exhaustion in safe haven bid
3. AUD outperformance because H4 CSM leads at 100, copper surging 2.9%, and AUDUSD H4 buy signal with strong JPY cross confirmation via AUDJPY strong buy

PRICE CONFIRMS

AUDJPY strong buy at H4 with confirmed D1 neutral sets up asymmetric continuation, and the 0.89 correlation between AUDJPY and NZDJPY confirms commodity JPY crosses are the cleanest expression of the dominant move. USDCHF negative 0.88 correlation with EURUSD means CHF fading on H4 should mechanically lift USDCHF even as EURUSD faces D1 buy versus H4 sell conflict. NZDUSD is fading in H4 CSM from 78 to 16, confirming it lags AUD and should not be used as a proxy for risk-on commodity exposure.

REGIME

Mixed confirmed conflicted. VIX at 17.95 falling and S&P500 up 0.62 support risk-on, but Gold surging to 4707 up 0.64 alongside Bitcoin falling 1.72 reflects residual safe haven demand that prevents clean risk-on classification.

CONTRADICTIONS

1. USD direction: Fundamental USD bullish bias and DXY up conflict with D1 CSM USD at 0 and negative USD proxy reading of -0.58, suggesting narrative leads price by more than one session
2. GBP: H4 CSM accelerating to 60 from D1 of 11 conflicts directly with D1 neutral signal, UK political bearish fundamental, and H4 sell signal on GBPUSD creating an unusable setup

TRADE IMPLICATIONS

Best: AUDJPY up - H4 strong buy, AUD CSM leads, copper surging, JPY structurally weak - Conviction 7/10
Secondary: USDCHF up - CHF H4 fading from dominance, USD accelerating, negative 0.88 correlation confirms - Conviction 6/10
Avoid: NZDUSD - H4 CSM collapsing from 78 to 16 while AUD diverges higher
Watch: DXY breaking above 99.00 confirms USD acceleration and validates both primary and secondary trades simultaneously

themes.theme: GBP Pressure from UK Political Uncertainty
Oil Supply Concerns via Hormuz Strait

key_observation: Hot US PPI data has triggered a significant USD rally driven by elevated Fed rate hike expectations and rising bond yields. This is pressuring major G10 currencies, particularly JPY and GBP. Geopolitical tensions in the Middle East are providing additional safe-haven support to the dollar while creating commodity volatility. UK political turmoil is an additional GBP headwind.
watch: Fed communications on inflation trajectory; Trump-Xi trade talks outcome; further Iran-US developments affecting Hormuz shipping; UK political developments around Streeting; BoJ policy stance given JGB selloff and JPY weakness
